name: Grade 1 Healthy Cooking — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for first-grade vocabulary, observation, skill practice, and making in Healthy Cooking. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in first-grade vocabulary, observation, skill practice, and making in Healthy Cooking.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore first-grade vocabulary, observation, skill practice, and making in Healthy Cooking
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record first-grade vocabulary, observation, skill practice, and making in Healthy Cooking by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: USDA MyPlate and food safety guidance
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Healthy Cooking pathway.

units.title: Investigate: first-grade vocabulary, observation, skill practice, and making in Healthy Cooking
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about first-grade vocabulary, observation, skill practice, and making in Healthy Cooking?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record first-grade vocabulary, observation, skill practice, and making in Healthy Cooking.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore first-grade vocabulary, observation, skill practice, and making in Healthy Cooking
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record first-grade vocabulary, observation, skill practice, and making in Healthy Cooking by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record first-grade vocabulary, observation, skill practice, and making in Healthy Cooking. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to first-grade vocabulary, observation, skill practice, and making in Healthy Cooking.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
